title: Character limit board description
excerpt:

posts.author: unknown (Georg L)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I did not find anything when I googled or searched in the forum, so I gotta ask here:
Is there a character limit on the board description?
When I first used monday.com last year the description seemed not to be limited in the UI and it also looked different than today.
Also in the API documentation there is no notice about a limit on the board description.
My partner used to put lots of information inside the description and now we are limited here, searching for a solution.

Cheers,
Georg

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Georg!

There is a 1,000 character limit on the board descriptions that wasn’t enforced on all accounts before and some accounts were able to add much more in that space previously. However, now there is a 1,000 character limit so that would explain why you’re running into this issue now!

Thanks for pointing out the API documentation - that’s a good note for our team to be aware of!
